rulings.Case Title: JESUS THOMAS SOTO VS. ALL PERSONS AND OCCUPANTS WHETHER KNOWN OR ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 17, 2017, line 4. DEFENDANT JEAN LOUIE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege fact that would support unlawful holding by force, menace or threats under CCP 1161. See Jordan v. Talbot (1961) 55 Cal.2d 597 ("Force and menace can be implied from defendant's agent's removal of plaintiff's furniture and his admonishment to "Get the hell out of here. You're out. ..."); McCauley v. Weller (1859) 12 Cal.500 ("Several men go to an outer building, occupied by the agent of plaintiff, and in which were the keys of the premises, against the will, and notwithstanding the protest of this agent; an inner door is forced and the keys taken, with which an entry into the main building is effected.") =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. KIM MCKENNA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 17, 2017, line 9. DEFENDANTS JASON MCKENNA, KIMIYE MCKENNA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges complaisance with CCP 1162. Defendant fails to cite any authority for the heightened standard for service advanced in the moving papers. Defendants also fail to cite any authority for the proposition that Defendants may bring multiple demurrers to the same complaint on different grounds under CCP 430.10. =(501/REQ)
